objective: Final benchmarking pass: Test Ibis Full on 20M records with 10 columns and update README speedups.
design_decisions: Refined benchmark result recording to track column count, ensuring accurate performance reporting for variable dimensionality.
Validated that 20M rows x 10 columns can run in Full mode within ~32 seconds, showing that OOM at 20 columns was a memory pressure threshold rather than a hard engine failure.

results.scaling_insight: Memory usage remains extremely low (under 5MB peak) for Ibis during the profiling phase due to pushdown, but the construction of the result object/matrix can hit system limits at very high dimensionality (20M x 20 cols).
